name: Quick Sweet and Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 3/4 oz Apricot halves in syrup, drained
2 tbsp Bottled sweet and sour sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the chicken chunks according to package directions. Keep warm.
2. Heat the apricots, snap peas, sweet and sour sauce, and soy sauce in a medium saucepan over medium heat until the peas are tender crisp.
3. Stir the chicken into the apricot mixture.
4. Serve the chicken mixture over rice.
Microwave Oven Instructions:
1. Microwave the chicken chunks according to package directions; keep warm.
2. Combine the apricots, snap peas, sweet and sour sauce, and soy sauce in a medium microproof baking dish. Cover and cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 2 minutes; stir.
3. Cook on HIGH an additional 1 to 2 minutes, or until thoroughly heated. Stir the chicken into the apricot mixture.
4. Serve the chicken mixture over rice.
